info.name: iPaymu Public API v2
info.description:
• Url Live/Production: https://my.ipaymu.com

  • Url Development/Sandbox: https://sandbox.ipaymu.com

Sample Generate Signature:

  • PHP (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-php)

  • NodeJS (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-nodejs)

  • Python (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-python)

  • Golang (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-go)

  • Dotnet C# (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-dotnet)

  • Ruby (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-ruby)

  • Java (https://github.com/ipaymu/ipaymu-payment-v2-sample-java)

Catatan:

  • VA dan Api Key bisa didapatkan pada menu Integrasi di dashboard iPaymu Anda.

  • VA dan Api Key Mode Sandbox/Development berbeda dengan VA dan Api Key Mode Production/Live.

  • Jika mendapatkan kendala integrasi silakan hubungi support@ipaymu.com atau WhatsApp https://wa.link/p8vnr7

Notes:

• VA and Api Key can be found in the Integration menu on your iPaymu dashboard.
• VA and Api Key Mode Sandbox/Development are different with VA and Api Key Mode Production/Live.
• If you have problem for integration, please contact support@ipaymu.com or via WhatsApp https://wa.link/p8vnr7

formdata.description: Notify URL for receive webhook from iPaymu. (iPaymu will send param in POST method to this URL when buyer make a payment)

Payment method. Value:
- Virtual Account => 'va'
- Convenience Store => 'cstore'
- COD => 'cod'
- Pay Later => 'paylater'
- QRIS => 'qris'

Payment channel of the payment method
* Virtual Account (va)
  - BAG => 'bag'
  - BCA => 'bca'
  - BNI => 'bni'
  - Cimb Niaga => 'cimb'
  - Mandiri => 'mandiri'
  - Muamalat => 'bmi'
  - BRI => 'bri'
  - BSI => 'bsi'
  - Permata => 'permata'

* Bank Transfer (banktransfer)
  - BCA => 'bca'

* Convenience Store (cstore)
  - Alfamart => 'alfamart'
  - Indomaret => 'indomaret'

* Cash On Delivery (cod)
  - Kurir RPX => 'rpx'

* Pay Later (paylater)
  - Akulaku => 'akulaku'

* QRIS (qris)
  - qris => 'qris'
Weight product in kg  (for COD payment) (nullable)
Width product in cm (for COD payment) (nullable)
Height product in cm (for COD payment) (nullable)
Length product in cm (for COD payment) (nullable)

formdata.description: mandatory - Notify URL for receive webhook from iPaymu. (iPaymu will send param in POST method to this URL when buyer make a payment)

mandatory - Payment method. Value:

  • Virtual Account => 'va'
  • Convenience Store => 'cstore'
  • COD => 'cod'
  • QRIS => 'qris'
  • Credit Card => 'cc'
  • Pay Later => 'paylater'

mandatory - Payment channel of the payment method

  • Virtual Account (va)

    • BAG => bag
    • BCA => bca
    • BPD Bali => bpd_bali
    • BNI => bni
    • Cimb Niaga => cimb
    • Mandiri => mandiri
    • Muamalat => bmi
    • BRI => bri
    • BSI => bsi
    • Permata =>permata
    • Danamon => danamon

  • Convenience Store (cstore)

    • Alfamart => alfamart
    • Indomaret => indomaret

  • Cash On Delivery (cod)

    • Kurir RPX => rpx

  • QRIS (qris)

    • QRIS => mpm

  • Credit Card

    • Credit Card => cc

  • Pay Later

    • Akulaku => akulaku

optional - Custom expired payment code in hours Nb:

  • BSI VA max 3 hours
  • BRI VA max 2 hours
  • BCA VA can't be customized (default 12 hours)
  • Con Store Alfamart can't be customized (default 24 hours)
  • QRIS can't be customized (default 5 minutes)

optional - Custom fee direction (optional)

  • MERCHANT => fee charged to merchant,
  • BUYER => fee charged to buyer
conditional - Weight product in kg (for COD payment)
conditional - Width product in cm (for COD payment)
conditional - Height product in cm (for COD payment) (optional)
conditional - Length product in cm (for COD payment)
conditional - Shipping name from API Shipping Calculate (for COD payment)
conditional - Service name from API Shipping Calculate (for COD payment)
optional - Success URL after payment (case redirect payment Akulaku & Credit Card)
optional - Cancel URL for failed payment (case redirect payment optional - Akulaku & Credit Card)

item.name: Callback Params (Success, Pending, and, Expired Transaction)

request.description:
iPaymu Callback Documentation

Callback parameters will be sent when the buyer successfully makes the payment.

Configuration:
You can configure the Callback Content-Type (application/x-www-form-urlencoded or application/json) in your dashboard settings:

  • Production: https://my.ipaymu.com/integration/setting

  • Sandbox: https://sandbox.ipaymu.com/integration/setting

Notes:

  • Callback is automatically re-sent if we don't get http response 200.

  • Make sure to validate when receiving callbacks more than 1 time not to update your transaction.

  • Signature Validation: To verify the request is truly from iPaymu, validate the signature parameter.

  • Secret Key: Use your iPaymu Merchant VA (Virtual Account) number as the $secretKey.

  • Mechanism:

  1. Remove the signature parameter from the received data.

  2. Sort the data by keys in ascending order (ksort).

  3. Convert the sorted data to a JSON string.

  4. Generate the HMAC-SHA256 hash using the JSON string and your Secret Key (VA).

  5. Compare your generated signature with the received signature.

=======================================================================

Dokumentasi Callback iPaymu

Parameter callback akan dikirimkan saat pembeli berhasil melakukan pembayaran.

Konfigurasi:
Anda dapat mengatur Tipe Konten Callback (application/x-www-form-urlencoded atau application/json) melalui pengaturan dashboard:

  • Production: https://my.ipaymu.com/integration/setting

  • Sandbox: https://sandbox.ipaymu.com/integration/setting

Catatan:

  • Callback secara otomatis dikirim ulang jika kami tidak mendapatkan http response 200.

  • Pastikan melakukan validasi saat menerima callback lebih dari 1 kali untuk tidak memperbarui status transaksi Anda ke berhasil (mensukseskan transaksi).

  • Validasi Signature: Untuk memverifikasi bahwa request benar-benar dari iPaymu, validasi parameter signature.

  • Secret Key: Gunakan nomor VA Merchant iPaymu (Virtual Account) Anda sebagai $secretKey.

  • Mekanisme:

  1. Hapus parameter signature dari data yang diterima.

  2. Urutkan data berdasarkan kunci (key) secara ascending (ksort).

  3. Konversi data yang sudah diurutkan menjadi string JSON.

  4. Generate hash HMAC-SHA256 menggunakan string JSON tersebut dan Secret Key (VA) Anda.

  5. Bandingkan signature hasil generate Anda dengan signature yang diterima.

Example Code: Signature Validation (PHP)

1. PHP

// Nomor VA iPaymu Anda
$secretKey = '117000xxxxxx'; 
// 1. Ambil Data Masuk (Mendukung JSON atau Form-Data sesuai setting dashboard)
$input = file_get_contents('php://input');
$data  = json_decode($input, true) ?? $_POST;
// 2. Pisahkan signature yang diterima
$receivedSignature = $data['signature'] ?? '';
unset($data['signature']); [cite_start]// [cite: 29]
// 3. Urutkan data berdasarkan key (Ascending A-Z)
ksort($data); [cite_start]// [cite: 31]
// 4. Generate Signature
$jsonBody = json_encode($data); [cite_start]// [cite: 33]
$calculatedSignature = hash_hmac('sha256', $jsonBody, $secretKey); [cite_start]// [cite: 33]
// 5. Bandingkan
[cite_start]if (hash_equals($calculatedSignature, $receivedSignature)) { // [cite: 35]
    // Signature Valid. Proses transaksi update database.
    echo json_encode(['status' => 'success']);
} else {
    // Signature Tidak Valid. Abaikan.
    http_response_code(400);
}
?>

2. Node.js (Express)

const crypto = require('crypto');
const express = require('express');
const app = express();
// Middleware untuk handle JSON dan URL-encoded
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));
app.post('/callback', (req, res) => {
    const secretKey = '117000xxxxxx'; // Nomor VA iPaymu Anda
    // 1. Ambil Data
    let data = req.body;
    // 2. Pisahkan signature yang diterima
    const receivedSignature = data.signature;
    delete data.signature; // Hapus signature agar tidak ikut di-hash
    // 3. Urutkan object berdasarkan key (Meniru PHP ksort)
    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(data).sort();
    const sortedData = {};
    sortedKeys.forEach(key => {
        sortedData[key] = data[key];
    });
    // 4. Generate Signature
    const jsonBody = JSON.stringify(sortedData);
    const calculatedSignature = crypto
        .createHmac('sha256', secretKey)
        .update(jsonBody)
        .digest('hex');
    // 5. Bandingkan
    if (calculatedSignature === receivedSignature) {
        // Valid
        console.log('Transaksi Terverifikasi');
        res.status(200).json({ status: 'OK' });
    } else {
        // Tidak Valid
        console.error('Signature Salah');
        res.status(400).send('Invalid Signature');
    }
});

Source:

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WfBEI5ry6V7knuSiCONYC4ZhQmD8Aipn/view

item.description:
Unauthorized Credential

  • Error Message: unauthorized, 401

  • Description: Usually happens when using wrong credentials or mixing sandbox and production credentials

  • Solutions: Ensure you're using the correct VA and API Key for the environment (sandbox vs production)

Unauthorized Signature

  • Error Message: {"Message":"unauthorized signature"}, 401

  • Description: Can be caused by illegal characters that interfere with signature generation (like ` or special quotes) or sending data with null values

  • Solutions: Remove special characters from parameters, ensure no null values, verify signature generation process

Invalid Domain

  • Error Message: invalid domain, 406

  • Description: Occurs when return url, cancel url, or notify url are not registered in the dashboard

  • Solutions: Register all domains in your iPaymu dashboard; for production, domains need activation

  • Reference: https://blog.ipaymu.com/mengatasi-masalah-error-invalid-ip-domain-di-ipaymu/

Production IP & Domain Requirements

  • IP Check: Production has IP validation - user needs static IP registered to dashboard

  • Domain Activation: Multiple domains can be registered but require activation request

  • Outgoing IP: Ensure registered IP is the one making requests to iPaymu

  • Domain Validation: URLs must be registered and activated in dashboard for production use

request.description:
API ini berfungsi untuk mengetahui informasi transaksi, termasuk status dan nilai transaksi secara realtime.
Status transaksi yang bisa dianggap berhasil bisa dilihat pada response parameter:
Data->Status: 1 atau 6 atau 7

formdata.description: -2 => Expired, 0 => Pending, 1 => Berhasil, 2 => Batal, 3 => Refund, 4 => Error, 5 => Gagal, 6 => Berhasil - Unsettled, 7 => Escrow,

• created_at => filter by transaction created date
  • indate => filter by transaction paid date

• 0 => Mutasi
  • 2 => Penarikan
  • 5 => Komisi
  • 7 => Bank Transfer/VA
  • 10 => COD
  • 11 => Convenience Store
  • 20 => Pindah Saldo
  • 22 => Akulaku
  • 23 => QRIS
  • 24 => EDC
  • 27 => QRIS Payment

• id => transaction id
  • created_at => filter by transaction created date
  • indate => filter by transaction paid date

exec: // Dynamic global pre-request script for iPaymu API v2
// Ini akan secara otomatis menghasilkan signature untuk semua endpoint iPaymu
// Ambil nilai apiKey dan va dari environment
// Validasi bahwa apikey dan va tersedia
console.error('apiKey atau va tidak ditemukan di environment variables');
// Fungsi untuk menghasilkan signature berdasarkan tipe request
// Ambil body data berdasarkan tipe konten
console.log('Body bukan JSON atau tidak valid');
// Handle form urlencoded dengan normalisasi array
// Normalisasi field array (misalnya product[], qty[] menjadi product, qty sebagai array)
// Jika nilainya berisi koma, maka pecah jadi array
// Jika bukan field array yang dikenali, tetap jadikan array
// Handle form data dengan normalisasi array
